page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 40 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, 155.0 GB of system memory, and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. The server includes a single NVIDIA Turing T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM, but does not feature any local storage.

Benchmark data indicates a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core or GPU-accelerated workloads. Single-core performance is weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25 percent, and single-threaded gzip compression rated as poor. However, multi-core performance is average, as demonstrated by Passmark and Geekbench multi-core scores. The server excels in LLM inference tasks, achieving top-tier prompt processing speeds and strong text generation speeds for both 135M and 7B models.

From a resource density perspective, the absence of local storage requires external storage attachments, which is a key architectural tradeoff. The hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads that can leverage the dedicated GPU for parallel processing or inference, offsetting the weaker single-threaded CPU performance.

This server is suited for small to medium LLM inference, machine learning workloads, multi-threaded data processing, and GPU-accelerated applications. It is less suited for single-threaded tasks or applications requiring high-speed local storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6i-c40g1.10xlarge is an x86_64 server featuring 40 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores, 155.0 GB of RAM, and a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps. It includes a single NVIDIA Turing T4 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM, but lacks local storage. Performance benchmarks show weak single-core CPU capabilities, with single-threaded compression tasks scoring in the bottom tier. Conversely, multi-core performance is average, and the server achieves top-tier results in LLM inference prompt processing for 135M and 7B models. Qualitatively, this server offers a balanced resource profile for GPU-accelerated workloads, though users must provision external storage. It is suited for machine learning inference, multi-threaded data processing, and parallel computing tasks.

tagline: An x86 server featuring a dedicated Turing GPU and forty physical cores, optimized for parallel processing and machine learning inference.

Equipped with one NVIDIA Turing T4 GPU featuring 16 GB VRAM
Top-tier prompt processing and strong text generation speeds for 135M and 7B LLMs
